migrations.rollbackPlan: Disable qualified-view writes first. Preserve the aggregate and receipts for a forward fix, or restore the verified pre-migration snapshot if data rollback is required.

proofs.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pragma_table_info('timeline_publications') WHERE name IN ('qualified_view_count','last_qualified_view_at')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pragma_table_info('audience_view_receipts') WHERE name IN ('publication_id','session_hash','created_at','expires_at')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pragma_table_info('audience_view_receipts') WHERE lower(name) LIKE '%ip%' OR lower(name) LIKE '%referrer%' OR lower(name) LIKE '%agent%' OR lower(name) LIKE '%token%' OR lower(name) LIKE '%raw%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pragma_index_list('audience_view_receipts') WHERE name = 'idx_audience_view_receipts_expiry'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pragma_foreign_key_check
